mechanics.excerpt: THE CLANS freeborns rife in the Clans; they are regarded as genetically inferior, the result of random combinations rather than finely honed bloodline . Most freeborn children come from officially approved genetic matches but that fact does Iittle t0 dispel the prevailing prejudice.
